title: Gisela Graham Antique Giant Hydrangea Flower Stem, Purple
features: Easy to mix and match realistic silks
Hydrangeas feature one bloom per stem
Creating a wonderful flower display in your home
Perfect for any scenes, home, wedding, office, party and hotel
description: Product Description Gisela Graham Antique Purple Giant Hydrangea Stem Artificial Flower maintain the beauty of fresh flowers, but they are cheaper and last longer lifetime than fresh flowers. They are perfect for any scenes, such as home, wedding, office, party, hotel, shop, restaurant, opening ceremony, event planner. Safety Warning This artificial plant contains materials that may cause skin irritation or allergic reactions. Handle with care and keep away from children and pets. Do not expose to extreme weather conditions.
